standards.title: Infection Prevention and Control Program
standards.description: The organization has a documented and implemented infection prevention and control program to prevent and reduce healthcare-associated infections.

objective_elements.description: The infection prevention and control program is documented, defining infection control policies and manual procedures.

measurable_elements.description: The organization has a documented infection prevention and control manual updated in accordance with national guidelines.

standards.title: Safe Medication Storage
standards.description: Medications are stored appropriately and securely under recommended storage conditions across the organization.

objective_elements.description: Medications are stored in a clean, secure, and temperature-controlled environment as per manufacturer requirements.

measurable_elements.description: Medication storage areas are secure, clean, and temperature-monitored with daily temperature logging.

standards.title: Fire Prevention and Safety
standards.description: The organization has a structured program to prevent, detect, and respond to fire emergencies.

objective_elements.description: The organization complies with national fire safety regulations and has emergency response protocols.

measurable_elements.description: The organization possesses a valid Fire No Objection Certificate (NOC) or fire clearance certificate from fire authorities.
